items.name_cn:
🆕Classic Calfskin Hammock Flip Bag
Model 33705
The Hammock Flip Bag interprets a classic silhouette with a soft texture and practical functionality, while continuing the series' iconic details. Featuring a creative stitching and flip structure, it easily converts between a shoulder bag and a compact Hobo bag. This version is crafted from classic calfskin.
Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
Magnetic snap closure
One external zip pocket, two internal slip pockets
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
LOEWE hot stamping or silver stamping
Dimensions 15-22-21 cm

specs.rawTitle:
🆕Classic Calfskin Hammock Flip Bag
Model 33705
The Hammock Flip Bag interprets a classic silhouette with a soft texture and practical functionality, while continuing the series' iconic details. Featuring a creative stitching and flip structure, it easily converts between a shoulder bag and a compact Hobo bag. This version is crafted from classic calfskin.
Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
Magnetic snap closure
One external zip pocket, two internal slip pockets
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
LOEWE hot stamping or silver stamping
Dimensions 15-22-21 cm

items.name_cn:
Original leather
11050A
Nappa leather Flamenco Clutch
The Flamenco Clutch, released in the 1970s, features a drawstring closure and a signature knotted bow. This version is made of Nappa leather.
Flamenco can hold a large wallet, all phone sizes, or an A5 notebook, a 0.5L bottle, and sunglasses case
Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or as a clutch
Detachable adjustable shoulder strap
Subtle magnetic closure
Gold suede lining
Loewe hot-stamped or hot-pressed 30-19-24

items.name_cn:
Puzzle
Model:f3001
The bag features a unique geometric line design creating a rectangular shape. The small version is made of classic calfskin and suede, decorated with specific color pattern inlay stripes.
Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld
Adjustable and detachable strap
Leather zipper pull
One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket
Anagram embossing
 ·in
Calfskin/Suede
Height 16.5 cm x Width 24 cm x Depth 10.5 cm

items.name_cn:
Puzzle Edge 2.0 New Color ❤️
👈 Newly upgraded and online ♻️
Size: 18-8-12.5cm
Geometric design upgraded! Adds external stitching to the classic silhouette. Large body made of imported Nappa calfskin with YKK hardware.
Feels hin good~ versatile and practical, too beautiful to look away ✨. Very photogenic. Ladies, go for it 🐤

items.name_cn:
Puzzle messenger bag!
❤️Size 36.5x27.5x10 cm, unique cubic shape, precise cutting creates volume, comfortable touch, extremely practical. This fashionable and compact messenger bag can be worn on one shoulder or crossbody, the detachable strap can be adjusted to the most comfortable length.
❤Made of imported Spanish cowhide🐄Soft and comfortable to the touch. Made of soft grainy cowhide, with a large zip pocket, herringbone pattern cotton canvas lining, two internal slip pockets, and a convenient zip pocket on the back, all in the same color with Anagram embossing.
❤️High-end exclusive custom hardware, cowhide, German imported Saffiano thread, imported YKK zippers, ZP craftsmanship, for you to enjoy top quality!
Model: 36036 Bronze Grey

specs.rawTitle:
Puzzle messenger bag!
❤️Size 36.5x27.5x10 cm, unique cubic shape, precise cutting creates volume, comfortable touch, extremely practical. This fashionable and compact messenger bag can be worn on one shoulder or crossbody, the detachable strap can be adjusted to the most comfortable length.
❤Made of imported Spanish cowhide🐄Soft and comfortable to the touch. Made of soft grainy cowhide, with a large zip pocket, herringbone pattern cotton canvas lining, two internal slip pockets, and a convenient zip pocket on the back, all in the same color with Anagram embossing.
❤️High-end exclusive custom hardware, cowhide, German imported Saffiano thread, imported YKK zippers, ZP craftsmanship, for you to enjoy top quality!
Model: 36036 Bronze Grey

items.name_cn: Same style as Xiaoshui 😍

specs.rawTitle: Same style as Xiaoshui 😍

items.name_en: Small 👄L New Geometric Bag, lightweight, versatile styling. The new solid Puzzle Lo Pink is a must-have! The highlight is this season's satin calfskin, which is smoother, glossier, and holds its shape better. The strap, metal buckle, and lining are all color-coordinated, offering a novel yet high-end look. The wide strap design is a pleasant surprise, and the back zip pocket has been replaced by a small pocket. The new ceiling item! Just buy it. Model: L10172B, Size: 24*10*14cm
